ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the indicator's validity period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the indicator's validity period */,
  "next_update_date" TEXT /* Next date when the indicator will be updated */,
  "indicator_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the indicator was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the indicator */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the methodology used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_indicator_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_type_id") REFERENCES indicator_types ("indicator_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Index indicating the political stability of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_types" (
  "indicator_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator type */,
  "indicator_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator type */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the reliability of the data source */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last verification of the data source */,
  "license_details" TEXT /* Details of any licenses or agreements related to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methodologies_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_versions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
